title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises:
Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises!
